w:r.w:t: User => Idea Understanding Agent => Business Information Collection => AI Agent Planning Layer => Specialized AI Agents => Startup Blueprint Dashboard => Interactive Refinement => Final Startup Blueprint
In Idea Understanding Agent [in this step check user input is valid or not]
Normal validation (Validates completeness of required input fields, e.g., location, budget, business goal)

LLM Validation Agent (Evaluates based on: Clarity & Coherence, Actionability/Relevance, and Competitive Uniqueness - detecting similar businesses, identifying potential pivots, and defining unique points of distinction)
Startup Manager Agent => Creates tasks for specialized agents (agent orchestrator)

If an agent discovers a critical issue (e.g., the Market Research Agent identifies total market saturation), it passes a signal back to the Startup Manager Agent to pause or pivot the entire workflow.
4. Specialized AI Agents[these agents are not fixed need brainstorming together]

(specifically optimized for LLMs) to fetch real-time market data, financial trends, and competitive intelligence. This ensures the Blueprint is based on current global economic conditions rather than static training data.
The system is connected to the
to provide high-fidelity, fact-checked data retrieval for all business modeling agents.
The system maintains a stateful decision log, allowing for asynchronous agent processing and robust version control during the iterative refinement phase.
The final output is rendered via a dedicated UI layer, offering high-fidelity Markdown or interactive HTML/CSS dashboards. Blueprints are exportable in professional, investor-ready PDF formats.

During the "Interactive Refinement" stage, the system manages the context window so the AI remembers broad iterative commands (e.g., "Make it cheaper" or "Target students") without losing the core business identity.
A clear process for when the user rejects AI recommendations (e.g., "I don't like these name suggestions" or "These financial forecasts are too optimistic").

Ensuring that interactive changes (like lowering the budget) update the relevant sections without breaking the existing models. Includes a mechanism to roll back the blueprint if the user dislikes the new iterations.
Add trivia api for read time data search (used in web search tool)
The deliverable should be downloadable in beautiful format.
